forward_condition.label: User wants to book a room
forward_condition.condition: The user expresses interest in booking a hotel room, checking availability, or making a reservation

forward_condition.label: Modify reservation
forward_condition.condition: The user wants to modify an existing booking, change dates, or update their reservation

forward_condition.label: Cancel reservation
forward_condition.condition: The user wants to cancel an existing booking or reservation

forward_condition.label: Proceed to booking
forward_condition.condition: The user confirms the room type and wants to proceed with booking

forward_condition.label: Modification complete
forward_condition.condition: End the conversation once the booking changes have been successfully confirmed

forward_condition.label: Cancellation complete
forward_condition.condition: End the conversation once the reservation has been cancelled and the user has been informed

forward_condition.label: Reservation confirmed
forward_condition.condition: End the conversation once the reservation details such as dates, room type, and guest name have been confirmed

booking_qualification_node.label: Hotel Booking Qualification Agent
booking_qualification_node.additional_prompt: Greet the guest and understand their request. Determine whether they want to book a new room, modify an existing reservation, or cancel a booking.

room_selection_node.label: Room Selection Agent
room_selection_node.additional_prompt: Ask the guest for check-in date, check-out date, number of guests, and preferred room type. Provide available room options and pricing.

modify_booking_node.label: Modify Booking Agent
modify_booking_node.additional_prompt: Help the guest modify their reservation. Ask for booking reference or name, then update dates, room type, or number of guests.

cancel_booking_node.label: Cancel Booking Agent
cancel_booking_node.additional_prompt: Assist the guest with cancelling their reservation. Ask for booking confirmation details and confirm cancellation before ending the conversation.

reservation_node.label: Reservation Agent
reservation_node.additional_prompt: Collect the guest's name, contact information, and confirm booking details such as room type, check-in date, and check-out date. Confirm the reservation clearly.
